subcodes.title: Du’a’a’th-Thalith li’l-Avval
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, and praise be unto Thee! There is none other God but Thee. Thou givest life and causest death, then bringest death and givest life, and verily Thou art the Ever-Living Who dieth not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم و بحمدک و لا اله الا انت تحیی وتمیت ثم تمیت و تحیی و انک انت حی لا تموت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God
